issues.description: Condition should be 'LeaderHasType' not 'HasCardOnBoard'. The card text checks if the Leader has the type, not if a card with that type is on board.
Condition field should be 'type' not 'name' when using LeaderHasType. The value should reference the type {The Seven Warlords of the Sea}.
Target scope should be 'OpponentCharacter' not 'ChooseOwnCharacter'. The effect returns opponent's characters to their hand, not your own.
Target should exclude 'this Character' via an exclusion filter to match card text requirement.

condition.type: The Seven Warlords of the Sea
